tasks.description: Add task type validation guard in orchestrator
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add validateTaskType() function before task assignment. Reject tasks with type='docs' or description containing 'ADR|architecture|documentation|write spec'. Return error to caller instead of routing to MiniMax.

review.summary: CEO resolved conflict (Codex approved, Claude rejected): REJECT — Claude's critical issues are valid. The file is incomplete (cuts off mid-line) and appears to be a complete rewrite rather than the requested minimal addition of validateTaskType(). Task spec asked for adding one function, not rewriting the entire orchestrator. Incomplete code cannot be dep

issues.description: File is incomplete - cuts off at line 'await' with no completion

Task spec requested adding validateTaskType() function to existing file, but this appears to be a complete rewrite of orchestrator.ts without showing what existing functionality was preserved or removed
Added complex agent rejection/pausing logic that was not requested in the task spec - this is overengineering beyond the scope
No test file provided for the validateTaskType function or the complex orchestration logic
Custom TaskValidationError class added without clear justification - may be unnecessary abstraction

strengths: Covers all forbidden task types and patterns
Uses a custom TaskValidationError to signal validation failures
Clean, readable implementation without any `any` usage

tasks.context: In backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts, add validateFilePaths() method. Check each deliverable.code path exists in known file tree (use hardcoded list from context). Reject task if any path is invalid or fabricated.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts, add MAX_CONTEXT_LENGTH=600 constant. In orchestrator.ts validateTask(), reject tasks where context.length > MAX_CONTEXT_LENGTH with error message explaining 600 char limit for MiniMax compatibility.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, create validateBeforeAssignment() that runs all guards (type, file paths, context length, single-file rule) before routing to agent. Log validation failures to logger with task ID and rejection reason.

tasks.description: Add quality gate auto-approval bypass for validated tasks
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts, add VALIDATED_TASK_AUTO_APPROVE flag. If task passed all pre-flight validations and agent=backend-core|backend-ledger|backend-tax, skip manual review and auto-approve. Log decision.
